install_cmds: apt-get update && apt-get install -y git wget build-essential
pip install pyg_lib torch_scatter torch_sparse torch_cluster torch_spline_conv -f https://data.pyg.org/whl/torch-2.5.0+cu121.html
pip install ogb scikit-learn networkx xxhash

python -c "from torch_geometric.datasets import Planetoid; Planetoid(root='/data/Planetoid', name='Cora'); Planetoid(root='/data/Planetoid', name='CiteSeer'); Planetoid(root='/data/Planetoid', name='PubMed'); print('Planetoid datasets downloaded.')"

python -c "from torch_geometric.datasets import TUDataset; TUDataset(root='/data/TUDataset', name='MUTAG'); TUDataset(root='/data/TUDataset', name='PROTEINS'); TUDataset(root='/data/TUDataset', name='NCI1'); TUDataset(root='/data/TUDataset', name='ENZYMES'); print('TU datasets downloaded.')"
